creator: Educare+
description: An Educare+ Strategic Partnership creates digital literacy training for older adults. Three-year initiative across 8 countries trains 12,400 older adults; produces 67 training modules, 12 curriculum frameworks, 8 policy recommendations. Partners report outputs quarterly; project coordinator needs unified registry showing "who trained how many?"

Impact Demonstration: The project closes and needs to show impact. Registry shows: 8 countries, 12,400 beneficiaries, 67 reusable modules adopted by 340+ care facilities (tracked through project post-survey). This quantifiable impact justifies continued Educare+ funding for future "Digital Aging" initiatives.
subject: Digital Literacy
Older Adults
Active Aging
Social Inclusion
title: Digital Literacy Training for Older Adults
